name: email-automation
description: Email Automation - MERN SaaS for Gmail + Brevo outreach, sequences and reply intelligence

scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client
scripts.//render: Render sets NODE_ENV=production, which makes npm ci omit devDependencies. Vite is a devDependency, so any client install must force --include=dev or the build fails with 'vite: not found'.
scripts.render:build:client: npm ci --include=dev --prefix client && npm run build --prefix client
scripts.//render:same-origin: Use this build command instead if you collapse to a single service that serves the SPA itself (SERVE_CLIENT=true, no static site).
scripts.render:build:web: npm ci --omit=dev --prefix server && npm ci --include=dev --prefix client && npm run build --prefix client
scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client,worker -c blue,green,magenta "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client" "npm run dev:worker --prefix server"
